info.description: PackWISE: Packaging Waste Instance Segmentation Dataset for Model Training and Evaluation. This dataset is part of the multi-sensor-dataset of the project K3I-Cycling and funded by the Federal Ministry of Research, Technology and Space (BMFTR), Germany under the funding reference 033KI201.
info.contributor: L. Roming, S. Rueger, M. Kalb, F. Beutler
